source: docs/operations/production_repoint_changeset.md (sections A-D), values copied verbatim; section-B additions verified against scripts/verify_cutover.py CONFIG_ROWS (sandbox_scan=True enrollment)
notes: This file is DATA, not code, on purpose: the CI secrets job's production-identity guard (.gitleaks-identity.toml) blocks @evergreenrenewables.com emails from re-entering .py/.ts/.tsx source; the reviewed production values therefore live here, in a .json file the guard deliberately scopes out.

EXCLUDED — safety_reports.intake.mailbox (changeset section B row 4): the email-intake lane is LEGACY/dormant (portal PULL superseded it 2026-06-05) and the row is NOT VC-03-enrolled; repoint it only if email intake is ever resurrected.

EXCLUDED — every section-E send-scope gate (*_enabled / *.polling_enabled / scheduled_send_local): gate flips stay CL-13 manual + Seth (FIXED External-Send-Gate class). production_repoint.py structurally REFUSES to load a map containing any *_enabled setting.

ADDED beyond the changeset's section-B table — subcontracts.subcontract_send.from_mailbox and po_materials.rfq_send.from_mailbox: both built after the changeset was authored (SC-S4 2026-07-15, ADR-0004 R3) and both enrolled in verify_cutover CONFIG_ROWS with sandbox_scan=True; mirror values verified against seed_subcontracts_send_config.py / seed_rfq_send_config.py.

SECTION B — Phase-1 single-mailbox model (operator decision 2026-07-23, AMENDED 2026-07-24): FOUR of the five from_mailbox lanes target its@evergreenrenewables.com. The fifth — safety_reports.weekly_send.from_mailbox — targets safety@evergreenrenewables.com, an SMTP ALIAS on that same its@ mailbox, so the single-mailbox model still holds (one mailbox, two addresses). The procurement@/progress@ per-lane shared MAILBOXES remain the later step. (system.operator_email already targeted its@.)

rows.notes: Read by portal_poll / publish_daemon / portal_admin / fieldops_sync / po_poll. Production hostname is the CL-09 DNS decision — confirm the exact hostname with the operator before commit; the changeset's value is used verbatim here. One Setting name, THREE physical rows (one per Workstream cell) — this is row 1 of 3.
Read by progress_weekly_generate (get_setting is workstream-scoped, so the progress copy is a separate physical row). CL-09 hostname caveat as row 1. Row 2 of 3.
Read by config_actuator (workstream-scoped copy). CL-09 hostname caveat as row 1. Row 3 of 3.

Graph send-from mailbox for the weekly safety-report email (weekly_send). AMENDED 2026-07-24 (operator decision): this lane alone sends from safety@, which is an SMTP ALIAS on the its@ mailbox — NOT a second mailbox. The D3 single-production-mailbox model is intact: the RBAC scope ITS-its-mailbox-only filters on PrimarySmtpAddress -eq its@, and an alias does not change the primary, so the resolved mailbox object still matches. The other four from_mailbox lanes remain its@. VC-03 sandbox-scanned (SANDBOX_DOMAIN_MARKER='evergreenmirror' — this value passes).

Graph send-from mailbox for the weekly progress-report email (progress_send). Phase-1 single-mailbox model (operator decision 2026-07-23); the shared progress@ mailbox is the later step. VC-03 sandbox-scanned.
Graph send-from mailbox for outbound PO email (po_send). Phase-1 single-mailbox model (operator decision 2026-07-23); the shared procurement@ mailbox is the later step. VC-03 sandbox-scanned.

Graph send-from mailbox for outbound subcontract packages (subcontract_send). Phase-1 single-mailbox model (operator decision 2026-07-23); the later shared-mailbox step reuses procurement@ (no dedicated subcontracts mailbox). ADDED beyond the changeset's B table (built after it); VC-03 sandbox-scanned.

Graph send-from mailbox for outbound RFQ email (rfq_send). Phase-1 single-mailbox model (operator decision 2026-07-23); at the later shared-mailbox step RFQs and POs share procurement@. ADDED beyond the changeset's B table (ADR-0004 R3, built after it); VC-03 sandbox-scanned.
Last-resort Resend page recipient (operator alert email). VC-03 sandbox-scanned.

The real UptimeRobot ping URL is genuinely unknown until UptimeRobot provisioning — prompted from the attended operator at commit time, validated https://; declined prompt (empty/EOF) skips the row LOUDLY and leaves VC-09 as the gate.

Production Box root folder id — NEVER typed by hand; resolved LIVE at commit via box_client.list_folder('0') exact-name match (ambiguity/absence refuse), the standup.py _stage_box_roots pattern. Folder name copied from standup.BOX_ROOT_CONFIG_ROWS.
Production Box root folder id — resolved LIVE at commit, exact-name match, refuse ambiguity/absence. Folder name copied from standup.BOX_ROOT_CONFIG_ROWS.
